caption: Interesting developments in politics as federal leaders debate AI policy! With all the discussion surrounding #AI, it's crucial to stay informed on the science driving these policies. What impacts do you think the outcomes of these debates will have on future #Innovation in the science sector?
call_to_action: Share your thoughts on the intersection of science and politics in the comments!
visual_prompt: A split image: One side shows a stylized graphic of an AI neural network, the other shows a blurred image of politicians debating. The colors are muted and professional, with a slight futuristic glow around the AI side.
